primaryUse: AI engineering taste, minimal didactic code, model intuition, and clear technical explanations.

reusePolicy.summary: Prefer licensed repositories for code examples and public posts/videos for explanatory style.
reusePolicy.codeReuse: MIT-licensed repos can be reused according to their licenses.
reusePolicy.transcripts: Use public captions or transcripts for summary with attribution only.
